Written / Computer-Based Test May be conducted as per requirement
Personal Interview May be conducted for shortlisted candidates
Medical Examination At any NTPC hospital; decision is final and binding
Document Verification All uploaded documents verified at appropriate stage

How to Apply for NTPC Assistant Executive (Operation) Recruitment 2026

Eligible candidates must apply online only through the official NTPC careers website at https://careers.ntpc.co.in. No other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates are required to possess a valid email ID, as NTPC will not be responsible for bouncing back any email sent to them.

Candidates must upload all required documents while applying; applications with incomplete or insufficient documents are liable to be rejected without further consideration. After applying online, the candidate must download the application slip generated by the system with a unique application number. A copy of the application slip may be retained by the candidate for future reference.

No document is required to be sent by post. Candidates should go through the full text of the advertisement and agree to all conditions before applying. Any canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate. All disputes arising from this advertisement shall be subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Delhi only.

  • Visit the official NTPC careers website at https://careers.ntpc.co.in
  • Register and fill the online application form with accurate personal, qualification, and experience details
  • Upload all required documents as per specified format
  • Pay the application fee online (General/EWS/OBC) or through SBI offline mode
  • Download and retain the application slip with unique application number
  • Do not send any documents by post; all submissions are online only

NTPC Assistant Executive (Operation) Application Form 2026

The online application form for NTPC Assistant Executive (Operation) Fixed Term Recruitment 2026 is available on the official NTPC careers portal at https://careers.ntpc.co.in. The application form requires candidates to fill in their personal details, educational qualification details, experience details, category details, and upload scanned copies of all required documents. Candidates must ensure that all details filled in the form are accurate and match the supporting documents exactly, as any discrepancy found at any stage of the selection process may lead to disqualification or termination of engagement.

The category once filled in the online application form cannot be changed and no benefit of a different category will be admissible later. Candidates are advised to carefully verify all entries before final submission, as no changes will be permitted after the application is submitted. All documents must be uploaded at the time of application itself; applications with incomplete or insufficient documents will not be considered for further process.

Eligible candidates are encouraged to fill out the online application form and complete all steps including document upload and fee payment well before the last date.

Apply Online at: https://careers.ntpc.co.in/recruitment/login.php

Important Instructions for Candidates

Candidates applying for NTPC Assistant Executive (Operation) Fixed Term Recruitment 2026 must carefully read and follow all conditions mentioned in the official advertisement before submitting their application. The management reserves the right to cancel, restrict, curtail, or enlarge the number of vacancies if need so arises, without any further notice and without assigning any reason. Posting will be at the sole discretion of the Management at any of the Stations, Projects, JVs, or Subsidiaries of NTPC, and posts are transferable.

If it is found that a candidate does not fulfil the eligibility norms or has furnished incorrect/false information or suppressed any material facts at any stage of recruitment, the candidature will stand cancelled, and if detected after appointment, services are liable to be terminated without any notice. Any claim or dispute arising from this advertisement shall be subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Delhi only. In case of any ambiguity, the English version of the advertisement will prevail.

  • Only Indian nationals are eligible to apply.
  • All qualifications must be from Universities/Institutions recognised and approved in India.
  • The category once filled in the online application form cannot be changed and no benefit of a different category will be admissible later.
  • Canvassing in any form will disqualify the candidate.
  • Fees once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.
  • Applications with incomplete or insufficient documents are liable to be rejected without consideration.
  • All disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Delhi only.
  • NTPC reserves the right to cancel/restrict/curtail/enlarge vacancies without prior notice.

How to Calculate Your Score Using SSC CPO Final Answer Key 2026?

Use this formula to estimate your score:

Total Score = (Correct Answers × Marks per Question) – (Wrong Answers × Negative Marking)

  • Wrong Answer: -0.25 mark (negative marking)

📄 Complete Details & Notification

Bank of Baroda (BOB) has published the Customer Service Associate (Clerical Cadre) Notification 2026 on 22nd April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 30 Customer Service Associate positions for meritorious sportspersons. Candidates within the age range of 20 to 28 years and holding a Degree in any discipline are eligible to apply online at www.bankofbaroda.bank.in. The application process will be active from 22nd April 2026 to 12th May 2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

FOLLOW US

Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Bank of Baroda has officially published the advertisement (BOB/HRM/REC/ADVT/2026/09) inviting applications from meritorious sportspersons for engagement as Customer Service Associate in the Clerical Cadre on a regular basis. The official notification PDF contains complete details including vacancy breakup, eligibility criteria, selection process, pay scale, application fee, document requirements, and all prescribed annexure forms. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification before filling the online application form to ensure they meet all eligibility conditions and avoid rejection at any stage. The notification is hosted on the official Bank of Baroda website and can be accessed free of cost.

  • Download Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF (Advt. No. BOB/HRM/REC/ADVT/2026/09)

Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organisation Name Bank of Baroda
Advertisement No. BOB/HRM/REC/ADVT/2026/09
Post Name Customer Service Associate (Clerical Cadre) – Regular Basis
Total Vacancies 30 Posts (24 Male + 6 Female)
Sports Disciplines Cricket, Kabaddi, Table Tennis, Football
Application Mode Online only
Application Start Date 22.04.2026
Last Date to Apply 12.05.2026
Eligibility Cut-Off Date 01.04.2026

Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Online Application Registration Starts 22.04.2026

Eligibility Cut-Off Date 01.04.2026
Field Trial Date To be notified on Bank's website

Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details

A total of 30 vacancies have been announced across 4 sports disciplines - Cricket, Kabaddi, Table Tennis, and Football - spread across posting locations in Delhi, Mumbai, and Chennai. Out of 30 posts, 24 are for Male candidates and 6 for Female candidates.

Each vacancy carries a specific role/specialisation requirement (e.g., Batsman, Fast Bowler, Goalkeeper, Midfielder, etc.), and candidates must ensure they apply only for the role matching their sports specialisation. The Bank reserves the right to modify the number of vacancies and their breakup as per its requirement. There is no reservation for SC/ST/OBC/EWS categories in this recruitment.

Recruitment of Sportspersons: Breakup of Vacancies

Sport Discipline Location Gender Vacancies Role (Specialization)
Cricket Delhi Male 4 01 Batsman, 01 Spinner Allrounder, 01 Fast Bowler, 01 Fast Bowler Allrounder

Football Mumbai Male 8 01 Goalkeeper, 02 Defenders, 03 Midfielders, 02 Forwards
Total 30 24 Male + 6 Female

Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

Eligibility Criteria: Customer Service Associate (30 Posts)

Position Vacancies Education Qualification Sports Qualifications
Customer Service Associate 30 Degree in any discipline from a recognised University or any equivalent qualifications recognised as such by the Central Government Should have represented a State / U.T. / the country in National / International competition; OR Medal winner in Junior National Championships; OR Medal winner in Khelo India Youth Games (age category above 18 years) / Khelo India Winter Games / Khelo India Para Games; OR Medal winner in Khelo India University Games; OR Medal winner in School Games Federation of India (SGFI); OR Represented University in Inter-University Tournaments; OR Represented State/U.T. School Team in National Sports/Games for Schools conducted by All India School Games Federation.

*Relaxation in upper age limit up to a maximum of five years to sportspersons considered meritorious, as per DOPT, Govt of India O.M. No. DOPT-1720781414772 dated 04.03.2020. Ten years relaxation in the case of SC/ST sportspersons.

Authority for Awarding Sports Certificate

S.N. Competition Authority for Awarding Certificate

2 National Competition Secretary of the National Federation or Secretary of the State / U.T. Association of the Game concerned.
3 Inter-University Tournaments Dean of Sports or other officer in overall charge of Sports of the University concerned.
4 National / Sports / Games for Schools Director or Additional / Joint or Deputy Director in overall charge of sports / games for Schools in the Directorate of Public Instructions / Education of the State.
5 Khelo India University Games / Khelo India Youth Games / Khelo India Winter Games / Khelo India Para Games Officer designated / Officer in charge from Sports Authority of India (SAI).

Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026 Age Limit

The minimum age to apply is 20 years and the maximum age is 28 years for General/EWS category candidates, calculated as on the cut-off date of 01.04.2026. 

S No Category Age Relaxation Relaxation to Meritorious Sportspersons as per DOPT guidelines* Total Age Relaxation*
1 General / EWS Nil 5 Years 5 Years
2 Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe 5 years 5 years 10 years
3 Other Backward Classes (NCL) 3 years 5 years 8 years

*This concession will be available only to those meritorious sportspersons who satisfy all other eligibility criteria and furnish a certificate in the form and from an authority prescribed as per the guidelines issued by the Government from time to time.

Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026 Application Fee

The application fee is non-refundable and must be paid online at the time of registration regardless of whether the candidate is shortlisted for Field Trials or not. General, EWS, and OBC candidates are required to pay ₹850/- (inclusive of GST) plus applicable payment gateway charges. SC, ST, ESM/DESM (Ex-Servicemen/Disabled Ex-Servicemen), and Women candidates are required to pay ₹175/- (intimation charges only, inclusive of GST) plus applicable payment gateway charges.

Payment can be made through Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, UPI, or any other available online payment mode. Transaction charges, if any, are to be borne by the candidate. Once fee payment is completed successfully, an e-receipt and application form will be generated, which should be printed and retained. The Bank will not entertain any refund requests under any circumstances.

Category Application Fee
General / EWS / OBC ₹850/- (Inclusive of GST) + Payment Gateway Charges
SC / ST / ESM / DESM / Women ₹175/- (Inclusive of GST) + Payment Gateway Charges

Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026 Pay Scale & Benefits

Selected candidates will be placed in the clerical cadre pay scale as applicable to Customer Service Associates in Bank of Baroda. The starting basic pay is ₹24,050/- per month and the scale progresses through multiple incremental stages over a period of 20 years, reaching up to ₹64,480/-. Increments are applied at different rates at various stages of the pay scale as detailed below. 

Pay Scale (as amended from time to time)
24050 – 1340/3 – 28070 – 1650/3 – 33020 – 2000/4 – 41020 – 2340/7 – 57400 – 4400/1 – 61800 – 2680/1 – 64480 (20 years)

Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026 Selection Process

The selection process consists of two main stages: Shortlisting/Screening of applications followed by Field Trials for shortlisted candidates. In the first stage, applications will be screened against the eligibility criteria including educational qualifications, relevant sports experience, domain expertise, and suitability. Meeting the minimum eligibility criteria does not automatically entitle a candidate to be called for Field Trials - the Bank may call candidates in a ratio as deemed appropriate at its sole discretion. The shortlisting criteria are internal and confidential and will not be shared with candidates.

Shortlisted candidates will be called for Field Trials at a designated venue, the evaluation criteria and qualifying cut-off for which will be determined solely by the Bank. No requests for change of centre, venue, date, or time for Field Trials will be entertained. The Bank's decision on shortlisting and selection at all stages is final and binding. Selected candidates must be Active Sportspersons at the time of joining and fit enough to participate in future tournaments. All selected sportspersons will be required to sign a written undertaking to play for the Bank's team whenever required.

Stage Details
Stage 1: Shortlisting / Screening Applications screened based on eligibility criteria, sports experience, qualifications, and suitability as determined by the Bank. Criteria are internal and confidential.
Stage 2: Field Trials Shortlisted candidates called for Field Trials at designated venue. Evaluation criteria and qualifying cut-off determined solely by the Bank.
Stage 3: Document Verification Original documents to be produced at the time of Field Trials / as called by the Bank. Failure to produce documents will debar candidature.

Obligations of Candidates Recruited as Sportspersons

Obligation Details
Playing for the Bank Sportsperson must play for the Bank / Bank's team whenever and wherever necessary.
Permission for External Events Prior permission required to participate in State / National / International events for other organisations. Bank reserves the right to withhold permission.
Misconduct Refusal to play for the Bank or playing elsewhere without permission will be treated as misconduct and attract disciplinary proceedings.
Written Undertaking All recruited sportspersons must give a written undertaking at the time of appointment.

How to Apply for Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026

The application process is entirely online - no other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates must visit the Bank's official website www.bankofbaroda.bank.in and apply through the Careers → Current Opportunities section. Before starting the application, candidates must ensure they have a valid personal email ID and active mobile number, a scanned passport-size photograph (20–50 KB, JPG format), a scanned signature in black ink on white paper (10–20 KB, JPG format), and scanned PDF copies of all required documents within the specified file sizes (maximum 500 KB per file).

Candidates are advised to fill the application with utmost care as no changes will be permitted after clicking the SUBMIT button. All details including name, caste, category, date of birth, mobile number, and email ID will be treated as final. Candidates must not submit more than one application; in case of multiple submissions, only the last valid completed application will be retained and fees for earlier applications will be forfeited. A printout of the system-generated application form and e-receipt should be retained for future reference.

  • Visit: www.bankofbaroda.bank.in → Careers → Current Opportunities
  • Register online and fill the application form carefully in all fields.
  • Upload scanned photograph, signature, and all required documents as per specifications in Annexure I.
  • Pay the application fee online via Debit Card / Credit Card / Internet Banking / UPI.
  • On successful payment, download and retain the e-receipt and application form printout.
  • Produce original documents at the time of Field Trials as per the document list in Section 10.4 of the notification.

Documents Required for Bank of Baroda Sportspersons Recruitment 2026

S.No. Document
i Printout of the valid Call Letter
ii Valid system-generated printout of the online application form
iii Proof of Date of Birth (Birth Certificate / SSLC / Std. X Marksheet or Certificate with DOB)
iv Photo Identity Proof (PAN Card / Passport / Driving Licence / Voter's Card / Bank Passbook with photo / Aadhar Card / Employee ID / Gazetted Officer ID)
v Certificate(s) / Awards / Medals fulfilling Sports Qualification Eligibility Criteria
vi Individual Semester/Year-wise Mark Sheets & Certificates for educational qualifications including final degree/diploma certificate
vii Caste Certificate in prescribed format (for SC / ST / OBC category candidates) - as per Annexure II
viii OBC certificate with Non-Creamy Layer clause (valid within one year as on date of advertisement)
ix EWS Income & Asset Certificate (for EWS candidates) - as per prescribed format
x Service / Discharge Book with pension payment order and rank proof (for Ex-Servicemen)
xi No Objection Certificate from employer (for candidates serving in Govt / PSU / Nationalised Bank)
xii Relevant documents in support of work experience (appointment letter, salary slip, relieving letter, etc.) wherever applicable
xiii Disability Certificate (Form I / II / III as applicable) for PWD candidates

Important Instructions for Candidates

Candidates must read the full official notification carefully before filling the application. All eligibility criteria are to be met as on the cut-off date of 01.04.2026. Change of category is not permitted at any stage after submission of the online application. Candidates should not furnish false, fabricated, or tampered information at any stage - doing so will result in disqualification or termination even after joining. Any canvassing or creating undue influence will lead to disqualification. All legal proceedings arising from this recruitment can only be instituted at courts in Mumbai. Signatures must remain consistent across all documents and correspondence throughout the recruitment process. Selected candidates will be governed by the Bank's service conditions including provisions related to probation (6 months), confirmation, disciplinary rules, and execution of service bonds. Candidates with adverse credit history, criminal cases, or adverse reports from CIBIL or other credit agencies will be ineligible. The Bank reserves the right to reject, modify, increase/decrease vacancies, or cancel the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason.

  • Online application once submitted cannot be modified. Fill with utmost care.
  • Keep email ID and mobile number active till completion of the recruitment process.
  • No request for change of Field Trial centre, venue, date or time will be entertained.
  • Maintain a minimum CIBIL score of 680 at the time of joining.
  • Probation period is 6 months from the date of joining.
  • All announcements / corrigendum will be posted only on the Bank's official website.
  • No separate communication will be sent to candidates who are not shortlisted or not selected.

Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has released the official Junior Engineer (Civil/ Electrical) Notification 2026 on 16 April 2026 at www.rbi.org.in. A total of 11 vacancies have been announced under the RBI Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between 20 to 30 years with a qualification of Diploma/Degree in Civil or Electrical Engineering with required experience can apply online from 16-04-2026 to 06-05-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

The full text of the advertisement is available on the Bank's website (www.rbi.org.in) and is also being published in the Employment News/ Rojgar Samachar. Candidates should thoroughly read the official advertisement to check zone-wise vacancies, eligibility criteria, age limit, reservation details, selection process and detailed instructions for filling the application form.

RBI Junior Engineer (Civil/ Electrical) Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

Educational Qualification (Mandatory): Junior Engineer (Civil): Minimum three years Diploma in Civil Engineering OR Degree in Civil Engineering with prescribed minimum percentage of marks. Junior Engineer (Electrical): Minimum three years Diploma in Electrical/Electrical & Electronic Engineering OR Degree in Electrical/Electrical & Electronic Engineering with prescribed minimum percentage of marks (relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD as per rules).

Experience (Mandatory): For Diploma holders: At least 2 years' post-qualification experience. For Degree holders: At least 1-year post-qualification experience (or 1-year graduate apprenticeship training in a PSU) in the relevant field as detailed in the notification.

Nationality: The candidate must be either a citizen of India, or a subject of Nepal/Bhutan, or a Tibetan refugee who came over to India before 1st January 1962, or a person of Indian origin who has migrated from specified countries with the intention of permanently settling in India (with eligibility certificate where required).

RBI Junior Engineer (Civil/ Electrical) Recruitment 2026 Age Limit

The age limit to apply for RBI Junior Engineer (Civil/Electrical) Recruitment 2026 is 20 to 35 years. The cutoff date for determining the age limit is 01 April 2026. Age relaxation will be provided to reserved category candidates as per government rules.

Category Minimum Age Maximum Age

OBC 20 years 33 years (3 years relaxation)
Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) 20 years 40 years (GEN/EWS) / 43 years (OBC) / 45 years (SC/ST)
Ex-Servicemen To the extent of service rendered in Armed Forces plus additional 3 years (subject to maximum 50 years)
Widows / Divorced women / Women judicially separated (not re-married) 20 years 35 years (40 years for SC/ST)

Note: Age is calculated as on 01 April 2026. Cumulative age relaxation will not be available. Candidates born not earlier than 02/04/1996 and not later than 01/04/2006 (both days inclusive) are eligible.

RBI Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 Salary Structure

Selected candidates will draw a starting basic pay of ₹47,700/- per month (i.e., ₹29,000/- plus nine advance increments admissible to Junior Engineers) in the scale of ₹29,000 - 1,700(3) - 34,100 - 2,040(4) - 42,260 - 2,720(6) - 58,580 - 2,950(2) - 64,480 - 3,370(3) - 74,590 - 4,050(1) - 78,640 and other allowances, as admissible from time to time. At present, initial monthly Gross emoluments for Junior Engineer (Civil/ Electrical) is approximately ₹91,309/-.

The RBI Junior Engineer (Civil/Electrical) Application Form 2026 is available in online mode only on the official website of the Reserve Bank of India (www.rbi.org.in). Eligible candidates must complete and submit the application form before the last date 06 May 2026 (11:59 PM) to avoid last-minute issues.

The application process includes registration, filling in personal and educational details, uploading documents, and payment of the application fee.

RBI Junior Engineer (Civil/ Electrical) Recruitment 2026 Online Apply Link

RBI Junior Engineer (Civil/ Electrical) Recruitment 2026 Selection Process

The selection for RBI Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 will be based on the following:

Online Examination (300 marks): Objective test consisting of English Language, Engineering Discipline (Paper I & II), General Intelligence and Reasoning. The examination is tentatively scheduled for 06 June 2026.

Language Proficiency Test (LPT): Candidates provisionally selected from the online examination will have to undergo a Language Proficiency Test in the Official/Local Language/s of the zone concerned. Candidate not proficient in the Official/Local Language/s would be disqualified.

Document Verification & Medical Examination: Final selection will be on the basis of performance in the online examination (in order of merit), qualifying in LPT, medical fitness and verification of certificates to the Bank's satisfaction.

RBI Junior Engineer (Civil/ Electrical) Recruitment 2026 Documents Required

Candidates must upload the following at the time of online application:

Recent passport size photograph, Signature, Left Thumb Impression, Hand-written declaration (in English) as per specifications given in the notification.

Note: At the time of LPT / Document Verification, candidates will be required to produce original documents related to age, educational qualification, experience, category, PwBD, Ex-Servicemen etc. as applicable.

Photo & Signature: Scanned as per exact specifications (Photograph: 20-50 KB, Signature: 10-20 KB, Left Thumb Impression: 20-50 KB, Hand-written Declaration: 50-100 KB).

RBI Junior Engineer (Civil/ Electrical) Recruitment 2026 Application Fee

Sl. No. Category Fee
01 SC / ST / PwBD / EXS ₹50/- + 18% GST (Intimation Charges only)
02 OBC / General / EWS ₹450/- + 18% GST (Examination Fee + Intimation Charges)

Fee can be paid online via Debit Card / Credit Card / Internet Banking / IMPS / Cash Cards / Mobile Wallets. Staff candidates are exempted from payment of fee/intimation charges. Bank transaction charges will have to be borne by the candidate. Fee once paid will not be refunded.

How to Apply for RBI Junior Engineer (Civil/ Electrical) Recruitment 2026

Eligible candidates for RBI Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026 must submit their application online through the official website www.rbi.org.in within the specified last date. The online application process is as follows:

Step 1 - Registration: Visit the Bank's website www.rbi.org.in and click on the link "Recruitment for the Post of Junior Engineer (Civil/ Electrical) - Panel Year 2026". Choose "Click here for New Registration" and enter basic details. A Provisional Registration Number and Password will be generated. Upload scanned photograph, signature, left thumb impression and handwritten declaration as per specifications.

Step 2 - Application Submission: Login with Provisional Registration Number and Password. Fill all required details in the online application form. Validate the details and save the application using "SAVE AND NEXT" facility. Upload required images and preview the entire form before final submission.

Step 3 - Final Submission & Fee Payment: After verifying all entries, click on "COMPLETE REGISTRATION". Proceed to payment of applicable fee/intimation charges online. On successful payment, an e-Receipt will be generated. Download and print the final submitted application form for future reference.

Edit Window: After the closing date, a short Edit Window (dates to be notified) will be available for limited corrections (Exam Centre, Father's Name, Mother's Name) on payment of ₹200/- correction fee.

Note: Candidates can apply only for one post and one zone. Offline applications will not be accepted. Incomplete applications or applications without proper photograph/signature will be rejected. Candidates are advised to apply well before the last date to avoid last-minute technical issues.

RBI Junior Engineer (Civil/ Electrical) Recruitment 2026 - Important Instructions

  • Candidates must possess all required educational qualifications, experience and certificates by the closing date of online application (06 May 2026). Certificates issued after the closing date will not be accepted.
  • Reservation benefits are available only as per prevailing Government guidelines. Candidates must upload correct category certificate in the prescribed format. PwBD candidates must possess a permanent disability certificate issued as per RPwD Act 2016.
  • Use of mobile phones or any electronic devices is strictly prohibited in the examination premises. Candidates spreading misleading information or using unfair means will face disqualification and legal action.
  • The Bank's decision regarding eligibility, qualification and candidature of candidates will be final. All information related to the selection will be published on the Bank's website www.rbi.org.in only; candidates must regularly check the website.
  • Candidates can contact the help facility through the link http://cgrs.ibps.in/ for any technical issues (mention the exact recruitment name in the subject).

Punjab and Sind Bank SO Vacancy 2026 Notification OUT

A recent official notification has been released by Punjab & Sind Bank for the recruitment of Specialist Officers (Security) in MMGS-II on a regular basis. As per the notification, a total of 27 Security Manager vacancies have been announced across various categories, offering a valuable opportunity for candidates with defense or police background to secure a stable banking career.

FOLLOW US

The online application process will begin from 15 April 2026 and will continue until 05 May 2026, giving eligible candidates a limited window to apply through the official website. This recruitment is particularly important as such lateral entry opportunities in public sector banks are not released frequently. Candidates are advised to carefully review the eligibility criteria, including experience requirements as a Commissioned Officer or Police/Paramilitary Officer, before applying.

Punjab & Sind Bank, a Government of India undertaking, has clearly stated that the number of vacancies is provisional and may change based on requirements. The detailed selection process, including written test, screening, and interview, will be conducted as per bank norms, and further updates will be published only on the official website. Candidates should stay alert for updates and ensure timely application submission to avoid last-minute issues.

Name of the Post: Punjab and Sind Bank Specialist Officers Online Form 2026

Post Date: 15-04-2026

Total Vacancy: 27

Brief Information: The Punjab and Sind Bank has announced a notification for the recruitment of Specialist Officers Vacancy. Eligible Candidates who are interested in the vacancy details & completed all eligibility criteria can read the notification & Apply.

India Post Payments Bank has released the official Chief Operating Officer (COO) Notification 2026 on 30 April 2026 at the official website www.ippbonline.bank.in. Eligible candidates aged between 40 to 55 years with a qualification of Bachelor’s Degree with minimum 55% marks along with extensive banking/financial sector experience can apply online from 01 May 2026 to 21 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

FOLLOW US

India Post Payments Bank Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

India Post Payments Bank (IPPB) has released Advertisement No. IPPB/CO/HR/RECT/2026-27/01 dated 30.04.2026 for recruitment to the post of Chief Operating Officer (COO). The notification includes complete details on eligibility, experience, job profile, selection process, application guidelines, and terms & conditions. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the full notification before applying online.

  • Download IPPB COO Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

India Post Payments Bank Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 Overview

Particular Details
Bank Name India Post Payments Bank (IPPB)
Advertisement No. IPPB/CO/HR/RECT/2026-27/01 dated 30.04.2026
Post Name Chief Operating Officer (COO)
Nature of Post Contractual
Category UR (Unreserved)
Tenure Initial 3 years, extendable by 2 more years (max 5 years)
Place of Posting Corporate Office, New Delhi (transferable anywhere in India)
Application Mode Online only
Official Website www.ippbonline.bank.in

India Post Payments Bank Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date & Time
Opening Date for Online Registration 01.05.2026 (10:00 AM)
Last Date for Submission of Online Application 21.05.2026 (11:59 PM)

India Post Payments Bank Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 - Vacancy Details

Post Name Category
Chief Operating Officer (COO) UR

India Post Payments Bank Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

Nationality: Candidate must be a citizen of India or fulfill the eligibility conditions as mentioned in the notification.

Age Limit (as on 01.04.2026): Not less than 40 years and not more than 55 years.

Educational Qualification:

Mandatory: Full-time Regular Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent with minimum 55% marks from a recognized University/Institute.

Desirable:

  • MBA / PGDM / PGDBM / PGDBA in Finance / Post Graduate Degree in Statistics / Mathematics / Economics / Econometrics.
  • Certifications in Data Analytics / Data Governance.

Preferred Certifications: CAIIB, CISI, CBCP, FRM/PRM, CAMS, CIA, Six Sigma (Green/Black Belt), etc.

Post Qualification Work Experience (as on 01.04.2026):

  • Minimum 18 years of experience in Banks or Financial Institutions.
  • Out of which, at least 10 years specifically in handling Operations or Business Processes.
  • In the last 5 years, must have held a position not more than two levels below MD & CEO of a Public Sector or Private Sector Bank/FI for at least 2 years.

India Post Payments Bank Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee

Category Application Fee
All Candidates ₹750/- (inclusive of intimation charges)
  • Fee to be paid online only (Debit/Credit Card, Internet Banking, UPI etc.).
  • Fee is non-refundable.

India Post Payments Bank Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process

The selection will be done through the following stages:

  1. Shortlisting (based on qualifications, experience & profile)
  2. Psychometric Test (converted to score out of 100)
  3. Interview (100 Marks)

Final Merit: Psychometric Test (25%) + Interview (75%)

A merit list of top 3 candidates will be prepared. CTC negotiation will be held with the top-ranked candidate.

How to Apply for India Post Payments Bank Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026

Applications must be submitted online only through the official IPPB website. No other mode of application will be accepted.

Step-by-Step Application Process:

  1. Visit the official website www.ippbonline.bank.in
  2. Click on the "Apply Online" link under Current Openings.
  3. Register with your Name, Contact details, and Email ID to generate Provisional Registration Number and Password.
  4. Login and fill the online application form carefully with all personal, educational, and experience details.
  5. Upload the following scanned documents:
    • Recent Passport Size Photograph
    • Signature
    • Left Thumb Impression
    • Hand-written Declaration
    • Updated Resume (PDF)
  6. Pay the application fee of ₹750/- online.
  7. Preview the application, verify all details, and submit.
  8. Take a printout of the final submitted application form and e-receipt for future reference.

Apply Online at: https://ippbonline.bank.in (Link will be active from 01.05.2026)

Important Instructions for IPPB Chief Operating Officer Recruitment 2026 Candidates

  • Before applying, candidates must ensure they fulfill all eligibility criteria.
  • Only online applications will be accepted.
  • No changes/corrections are allowed after final submission.
  • Application fee once paid will not be refunded.
  • Candidates serving in Government/PSUs must submit NOC at the time of interview.
  • All correspondence will be sent via email only. Keep your email ID active.
  • Suppression of facts or submission of false information will lead to disqualification.
  • The Bank reserves the right to cancel/restrict/modify the recruitment process at any stage.
  • For any queries, write to: [email protected]

📄 Complete Details & Notification

The Punjab National Bank (PNB) has officially announced the Specialist Officer (Engineer) Recruitment 2026 with 30 openings. The detailed notification was published on 20 April 2026 at pnb.bank.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 20 to 30 years and hold B.E./B.Tech in Civil / Electrical / Mechanical Engineering with 60% marks along with minimum 1 year post-qualification experience in the relevant field can now submit their online applications from 21 April 2026 to 05 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

FOLLOW US

PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

Punjab National Bank has officially released the recruitment notification dated 20 April 2026 for the Recruitment of 30 Specialist Officers (Engineer) in JMG Scale I on direct recruitment basis. The notification contains complete details regarding vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, post-qualification work experience, job roles, selection procedure, examination centres, application fee, and general instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to download and read the official notification thoroughly before filling out and submitting their online application at https://pnb.bank.in/. Requests for change of category or any other details will not be permitted after submission of the online application form. All updates and further announcements will be published exclusively on the official PNB website.

  • Download PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 Overview

Organisation Name Punjab National Bank (PNB)
Notification Date 20-04-2026
Post Name Officer - Civil Engineer / Electrical Engineer / Mechanical Engineer in JMG Scale I
Total Vacancies 30 Posts
Scale JMG Scale I
Qualification B.E./B.Tech in Civil / Electrical / Mechanical Engineering with 60% marks from a recognised University
Experience Minimum 1 year post-qualification work experience in the relevant field
Age Limit (as on 01.01.2026) Minimum 20 years - Maximum 30 years
Application Mode Online Only at https://pnb.bank.in/
Opening Date of Online Registration 21-04-2026
Closing Date of Online Registration 05-05-2026
Tentative Date of Online Test 27th May 2026
Official Website https://pnb.bank.in/

PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 Important Dates

Event Date
Notification Date 20-04-2026
Opening Date of Online Registration 21-04-2026
Closing Date of Online Registration 05-05-2026
Age Cut-off Date 01-01-2026
Qualification / Experience Cut-off Date 05-05-2026 (Closing Date of Registration)
Tentative Date of Online Test 27th May 2026

PNB Specialist Officer Vacancy 2026

A total of 30 vacancies have been announced for Specialist Officer (Engineer) posts in JMG Scale I across three disciplines - Civil Engineering (21 posts), Electrical Engineering (7 posts), and Mechanical Engineering (2 posts). 

Specialist Officer (Engineer) Vacancy Distribution (30 Posts)

Post Name Total Vacancy
Officer - Civil Engineer (JMG Scale I) 21
Officer - Electrical Engineer (JMG Scale I) 7
Officer - Mechanical Engineer (JMG Scale I) 2
Total 30

PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria

Post Educational Qualification Post-Qualification Experience
Officer - Civil Engineer B.E./B.Tech in Civil Engineering from a recognised University with 60% marks (or equivalent recognised by Govt. of India) Minimum 1 year post-qualification experience in Civil Engineering - Construction/Renovation/Retrofitting/Interior Furnishing/Maintenance of Commercial/Residential/Institutional/Industrial/Administrative buildings; monitoring civil work of construction projects; preparation of estimates; checking of contractor bills
Officer - Electrical Engineer B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering from a recognised University with 60% marks (or equivalent recognised by Govt. of India) Minimum 1 year post-qualification experience in Electrical Engineering - Construction/Renovation/Retrofitting/Interior Furnishing/Maintenance of Commercial/Residential/Institutional/Industrial/Administrative buildings; OR experience in installation/handling/maintenance of electro-mechanical equipment (UPS, Generators, Energy Saving Devices, Control Panels, HT-LT, Switch Gears, Cabling, Water Pumps, Air Conditioning Equipment, Lifts, etc.)
Officer - Mechanical Engineer B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering from a recognised University with 60% marks (or equivalent recognised by Govt. of India) Minimum 1 year post-qualification experience in Mechanical Engineering - Construction/Renovation/Retrofitting/Interior Furnishing/Maintenance of Commercial/Residential/Institutional/Industrial/Administrative buildings; AND experience in installation/handling/maintenance of electro-mechanical equipment (UPS, Generators, Energy Saving Devices, Control Panels, HT-LT, Switch Gears, Cabling, Water Pumps, Air Conditioning Equipment, Lifts, etc.)

PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 Age Limit

The age limit for PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 is calculated as on 01.01.2026. The minimum age is 20 years and the maximum age is 30 years for all three posts. The maximum age limit is applicable to Unreserved (UR) category and Economically Weaker Section (EWS) category candidates. Age relaxation is applicable to reserved category candidates as per Government of India rules. 

Category Age Relaxation
Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe 5 Years
Other Backward Classes (Non-Creamy Layer) 3 Years
Persons with Benchmark Disability (PwBD) 10 Years
Ex-Servicemen / ECOs / SSCOs (with minimum 5 years military service) 5 Years
Persons Affected by 1984 Riots 5 Years

PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 Application Fee

Candidates are required to pay a non-refundable application fee through online mode only. Bank transaction charges for online payment of application fee will have to be borne by the candidate. The fee once paid shall not be refunded under any circumstances, nor can it be held in reserve for any other examination or selection.

A candidate can apply for only one post; in case of multiple applications, only the latest valid and completed application will be retained and the fee paid for other multiple registrations will stand forfeited. Payment can be made using Debit Cards (RuPay/Visa/MasterCard), Credit Cards, Internet Banking, IMPS, Cash Cards/Mobile Wallets, or UPI.

Category Application Fee (per candidate)
SC / ST / PwBD candidates ₹50/- + GST @18% = ₹59/- (only postage charges)
All Others (General / EWS / OBC) ₹1,000/- + GST @18% = ₹1,180/-

PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 Salary / Pay Scale

Selected candidates appointed as Specialist Officers (Engineer) in JMG Scale I at Punjab National Bank will be entitled to pay and allowances as per the Bank's rules applicable to JMG Scale I officers. In addition to the basic pay, selected candidates will be entitled to Dearness Allowance (DA), City Compensatory Allowance (CCA), House Rent Allowance (HRA) or Leased Accommodation, Leave Fare Concession, Medical Insurance, Retirement Benefits, and other perquisites as per Bank rules.

The selected candidates will be required to execute an Indemnity Bond undertaking to serve the Bank for a minimum period of 03 years, or to pay the Bank a sum of ₹3,00,000/- (Rupees Three Lakhs Only) in case they leave before completion of 03 years of active service. Candidates must also maintain a healthy credit history with a minimum CIBIL score of 681 or above at the time of joining the Bank.

Post Scale Allowances & Benefits
Officer - Civil / Electrical / Mechanical Engineer JMG Scale I Basic Pay + DA + CCA + HRA/Leased Accommodation + Leave Fare Concession + Medical Insurance + Retirement Benefits + Other Perquisites as per Bank Rules

PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 Selection Process

The selection process for PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 will be based on an Online Written Test followed by a Personal Interview, or a Personal Interview only, depending upon the number of applications received against each post. The Bank may decide to follow either of two scenarios. Under Scenario 1 (Online Written Test + Interview):

The written test consists of Part I covering Reasoning (25 marks), English Language (25 marks), and Quantitative Aptitude (50 marks) - totalling 100 marks - and Part II covering Professional Knowledge (50 questions, 100 marks), with the entire test to be completed in 120 minutes.

For each wrong answer, one-fourth of the marks assigned will be deducted as penalty. Part II (Professional Knowledge) will be evaluated only for candidates who qualify in each paper of Part I. Candidates who qualify Part I will be shortlisted for interview based on marks in Part II. Personal Interview will carry 50 marks, and candidates must score minimum qualifying marks in the interview to be considered for final selection.

The final merit will be based on aggregate scores of Part II of the Online Written Test and the Interview. Under Scenario 2 (Shortlisting + Interview): Applications will be screened, eligible candidates will be called for a Personal Interview of 50 marks, and final selection will be based solely on interview scores.

Online Written Test Pattern (Scenario 1 - if applicable)

Part Test Name No. of Questions Maximum Marks Duration
PART I Reasoning 25 25 120 Minutes
English Language 25 25
Quantitative Aptitude 50 50
PART II Professional Knowledge 50 100

How to Apply for PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026

Eligible candidates must apply online only through the official Punjab National Bank website at https://pnb.bank.in/ under the Recruitment/Career section. No other mode of application will be accepted. Online applications can be submitted from 21 April 2026 to 05 May 2026. Candidates are required to have a valid personal Email ID and mobile number, which must remain active till the completion of the recruitment process.

Before applying, candidates must scan and upload their photograph, signature, left hand thumb impression, handwritten declaration, proof of age, caste/disability certificate, educational qualification certificates, and work experience documents as per the prescribed specifications. After successful registration, a provisional registration number and password will be generated and sent via email and SMS.

Candidates must take a printout of the system-generated online application form and e-receipt after payment and retain it for future reference. They should not send this printout to the Bank. All particulars filled in the online application form - including name, caste, date of birth, post applied for, address, mobile number, email ID, and centre of examination - will be treated as final, and no change or modification will be allowed after submission.

  • Visit the official website https://pnb.bank.in/ under Recruitment/Career section
  • Click on "Click Here for New Registration" and enter basic details to obtain provisional registration number and password
  • Fill in personal, qualification, experience, and category details accurately
  • Upload scanned photograph, signature, left hand thumb impression, handwritten declaration, and all required documents as per prescribed specifications
  • Pay the application fee online through Debit Card/Credit Card/Internet Banking/IMPS/UPI/Mobile Wallets
  • Submit the application after verifying all details; take printout of e-receipt and application form for future reference
  • Do not send the printout to the Bank

PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 Application Form

The online application form for PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 is available exclusively on the official Punjab National Bank website at https://pnb.bank.in/ under the Recruitment/Career section. The form requires candidates to fill in their personal details, educational qualification details, post-qualification work experience, category details, and choice of examination centre.

Candidates must also capture and upload a live photograph via webcam or mobile phone in addition to the scanned passport-size photograph. The handwritten declaration must be written in English only (not in capital letters) by the candidate in their own handwriting on white paper with black ink, and must state: "I, __________ (Name of the candidate), hereby declare that all the information submitted by me in the application form is correct, true and valid. I will present the supporting documents as and when required." A candidate can apply for only one post.

No change in any data filled in the online application will be permitted after clicking the Complete Registration button. An application incomplete in any respect - including without proper photograph, signature, left hand thumb impression, handwritten declaration, or failed fee payment - will not be considered valid.

Apply Online at: https://ibpsreg.ibps.in/pnbvpapr26/ (Under Recruitment / Career section)

Important Instructions for Candidates

Candidates applying for PNB Specialist Officer Recruitment 2026 must carefully read and comply with all instructions mentioned in the official notification before submitting their application. A candidate can apply for only one post. Candidature at all stages of the recruitment process shall remain provisional, subject to verification of eligibility criteria and other supporting documents.

Merely being shortlisted, appearing for the test/interview, or inclusion in the merit list does not confer any right to appointment. Selected candidates will be required to execute a Service Indemnity Bond undertaking to serve the Bank for a minimum of 03 years or pay ₹3,00,000/- if they leave before completion of 03 years.

Candidates must maintain a minimum CIBIL score of 681 or above at the time of joining. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The Bank reserves the right to cancel the recruitment process partly or entirely at any time without assigning any reason. In case of cancellation, application fees deposited will be refunded.

Any dispute arising out of the recruitment process shall be subject to the sole jurisdiction of the Courts situated at NCT of Delhi. Candidates are advised to possess/acquire a valid Aadhaar card for the process, as the Bank may conduct Online Aadhaar verification at different stages of the selection process.

  • A candidate can apply for only one post; in case of multiple applications, only the latest valid application will be retained.
  • Candidature at all stages is provisional and subject to verification of documents.
  • Candidates who have earlier worked in PNB or its merged/amalgamated entities and were discharged for reasons other than VRS/Resignation are NOT eligible.
  • Candidates with adverse reports regarding character, antecedents, or moral turpitude are NOT eligible.
  • Requests for change of contact number/address/email ID/examination centre/interview centre will not be entertained.
  • Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.
  • Selected candidates must execute a Service Indemnity Bond for 03 years or pay ₹3,00,000/-.
  • Minimum CIBIL score of 681 or above required at the time of joining.
  • All disputes subject to sole jurisdiction of Courts at NCT of Delhi.
  • Bank reserves the right to cancel/change the recruitment process at any stage without prior notice.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

State Bank of India (SBI) Recruitment 2026 has been released for engagement of retired SBI officers as Resolvers on a contractual basis. The recruitment is for 105 vacancies across various circles, and eligible candidates can apply online through the official SBI careers portal from 15 April 2026 to 05 May 2026. The selection process will be based on shortlisting and interview.

FOLLOW US

SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026-27 Notification PDF

Notification for Engagement of Retired Bank Officers as Resolvers on Contract Basis is published by State Bank of India. Candidates should thoroughly read the official advertisement to check circle-wise vacancies, eligibility criteria, age limit, reservation rules, selection process and detailed instructions for filling the online application form.

Download SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026-27 Official Notification

SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026-27 Eligibility Criteria

Educational Qualification / Experience Retired SBI officers of MMGS-II, MMGS-III & SMGS-IV grades only. No specific educational qualification required. Preference will be given to officers having sufficient work experience, deep knowledge of systems & procedures and overall professional competence in the relevant area.

Age Limit (as on 31.03.2026) Maximum age should not be more than 63 years. Engagement is permissible up to maximum 65 years.

Other Eligibility Conditions

  • Retired on attaining superannuation at 60 years (voluntary retirement/resignation/suspension cases are not eligible except specific VR conditions mentioned in the notification).
  • Unblemished service record, good health, no major ailment.
  • No pending CBI / law enforcement cases.
  • No punishment of Censure or higher in last 5 years of service.
  • Reservation for SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD as per rules.

SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026-27 Remuneration (Stipend)

Selected candidates will receive fixed monthly remuneration as under:

Grade of Retired Officer Monthly Remuneration (Fixed)
MMGS-II ₹45,000/-
MMGS-III ₹45,000/-
SMGS-IV ₹50,000/-

Note: Remuneration is without prejudice to pension. No other benefits/perquisites/HRA/PF/Gratuity etc. during contract period.

SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026-27 Application Fees

Nil - No application fee is required.

SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026-27 Application Form

The application process is online only. Eligible candidates must apply through the SBI career portal.

SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026-27 Selection Process

Selection will be based on Shortlisting + Interview.

  • Shortlisting: Based on eligibility, experience and performance track record.
  • Interview: 100 marks. Qualifying marks decided by the Bank.
  • Merit list prepared circle-wise & category-wise.
  • Final selection subject to medical fitness.

How to Apply for SBI Resolvers Recruitment 2026-27

Eligible retired SBI officers must submit their application online within the specified last date.

Step 1 - Visit the official link: https://sbi.bank.in/web/careers/current-openings

Step 2 - Click on Advertisement No. CRPD/RS/2026-27/06

Step 3 - Register online and fill the application form carefully.

Step 4 - Upload scanned documents:

  • Recent Photograph
  • Signature
  • Brief particulars of last 10 years experience (PDF)
  • ID Proof
  • Proof of Date of Birth
  • EWS/SC/ST/OBC/PwBD Certificate (if applicable)

Step 5 - Submit the application and take a printout for reference.

RRB NTPC UG City Intimation Slip 2026 Out - Download NTPC UG Exam City Slip

Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has officially released the City Intimation Slip 2026 for NTPC Undergraduate (UG) examination under CEN 07/2025. Candidates appearing for RRB NTPC UG exam can now download their exam city slip from the official website rrb.digialm.com or their respective regional RRB websites. The city intimation slip contains crucial information about exam city, date, shift timing, and reporting time. This document helps candidates plan their travel and accommodation arrangements before the admit card release. In this article, we provide the direct download link, step-by-step instructions, and all important details about RRB NTPC UG City Intimation Slip 2026.

FOLLOW US

  • Exam Dates: 7th May 2026 to 21st June 2026
  • Official Website: rrb.digialm.com / Regional RRB Websites
  • Download Available For: Exams scheduled from 7th May 2026 onwards (released in phases)
  • Admit Card Release: 4 days before exam date
  • Total Vacancies: 3058 Posts (UG Level)
  • Click Here to Download City Slip

What is RRB NTPC UG City Intimation Slip 2026?

The RRB NTPC UG City Intimation Slip 2026 is an advance notification document released before the admit card. It provides candidates with essential preliminary information about their examination to help them make necessary travel and accommodation arrangements. The city slip is NOT your admit card but serves as an important reference document.

Key Information Available in City Slip:

  • Allotted exam city and state
  • Scheduled exam date
  • Shift timing (Morning/Afternoon/Evening)
  • Reporting time at exam center
  • Gate closing time
  • Candidate's name and registration number
  • Category (SC/ST/OBC/General/EWS)
  • PwBD status (if applicable)

Important Notice: The city intimation slip is NOT your admit card and does not permit you to appear in the exam. It is only for informational purposes. You must download the admit card separately (available 4 days before exam) to enter the examination hall.

RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date 2026 (Released) - Check Schedule & Details

RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date 2026: The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has officially released the exam date for the NTPC Undergraduate recruitment under CEN 07/2025. Latest Update: RRB has announced the exam date for NTPC Undergraduate positions. The CBT-1 examination will be conducted from 7th May to 21st June 2026 at various centers across India. Candidates can download the exam date notification from the official RRB websites.

Quick Link: Download RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date Notification 2026

Key Highlights - RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date 2026

RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date 2026 Complete Details

The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has published the official exam schedule for the NTPC Undergraduate recruitment 2026 under CEN 07/2025. This notification is crucial for thousands of candidates who are preparing for these government positions in Indian Railways. The examination will test candidates' knowledge in General Awareness, Mathematics, and General Intelligence & Reasoning, and only shortlisted candidates will proceed to CBT-2, Typing Skill Test (if applicable), Document Verification, and Medical Examination.

How to Download RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date 2026 Notification?

Candidates can follow these simple steps to check and download the RRB NTPC Undergraduate exam date notification from the official website:

Step 1: Visit the official website of RRB at www.rrbcdg.gov.in (or respective regional RRB website)

Step 2: On the homepage, look for the "What's New" or "Notifications" section

Step 3: Find and click on the link titled "RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Date 2026" or CEN 07/2025 notice

Download Exam Date Notification Click Here

RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam Pattern 2026

Understanding the exam pattern is crucial for effective preparation. Here's what candidates need to know about the RRB NTPC Undergraduate examination:

  • Exam Mode: Online Computer Based Test (CBT)
  • Total Marks: 100
  • Number of Questions: 100
  • Duration: 90 Minutes
  • Negative Marking: Yes (1/3rd mark deducted for each wrong answer)
  • Subjects/Sections: General Awareness (40 Qs/40 Marks), Mathematics (30 Qs/30 Marks), General Intelligence and Reasoning (30 Qs/30 Marks)

Preparation Tips for RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam

With the exam date announced, candidates should focus on smart preparation strategies:

1. Create a Study Schedule: Divide your time wisely among all subjects based on your strengths and weaknesses.

2. Focus on Previous Year Papers: Solve at least 5-10 previous year question papers to understand the pattern and difficulty level.

3. Take Mock Tests: Regular mock tests will help you manage time and identify areas needing improvement.

4. Revise Regularly: Make short notes and revise them daily, especially for GK and current affairs.

5. Stay Updated: Keep yourself updated with current affairs, especially related to Indian Railways and general awareness.

RRB NTPC Undergraduate Admit Card 2026 - When to Download?

The RRB will release the admit card for NTPC Undergraduate examination approximately 4 days before the exam date. Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official website using their registration number and password. City Intimation Slip will be available 10 days before the exam.

Documents Required on Exam Day:

  • Printed copy of Admit Card
  • Valid Photo ID Proof (Aadhar Card/PAN Card/Driving License/Voter ID)
  • Recent passport-size photographs
  • Required stationery items (as per instructions)
  • Original Aadhaar or e-Aadhaar (biometric verification mandatory)

What After the RRB NTPC Undergraduate Exam?

After successfully appearing in the RRB NTPC Undergraduate examination, candidates should:

1. Result Declaration: The result is typically declared after the completion of all stages. Results will be available on the official website.

2. Answer Key: Preliminary answer keys may be released after the exam. Candidates can raise objections if any discrepancy is found.

3. Next Stage: Qualified candidates will be called for CBT-2, Typing Skill Test (for applicable posts), Document Verification, and Medical Examination.

Disclaimer: The information provided above is based on the official notification released by Railway Recruitment Board. Candidates are advised to visit the official website www.rrbcdg.gov.in for the most accurate and updated information.

📄 Complete Details & Notification

RRB Group D Eligibility Criteria 2026 state that candidates must be Indian nationals (or as per specified rules) who have passed Class 10/ITI/NAC, are within the prescribed 18–33 years age limit (with relaxations for reserved categories), and meet the required medical and physical standards as detailed in the official notification.

FOLLOW US

The RRB Group D Notification 2026 (CEN 09/2025) defines these criteria for Level-1 posts such as Track Maintainer, Pointsman, Assistant Pointsman, Assistant Loco Shed, and others, with a total of around 22,195 vacancies (revised figures noted in some sources). The recruitment process includes a Computer-Based Test (CBT), Physical Efficiency Test (PET), Document Verification, and Medical Examination.

RRB Group D Eligibility Criteria 2026 – Quick Overview

Here are the key points at a glance:

  • Minimum Education: 10th pass (Matriculation) from a recognized board, or ITI from NCVT/SCVT, or National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC) in relevant trade.

  • Age Range: Generally 18–33 years (calculated as on the cutoff date mentioned in the notification, such as 01.01.2026).

  • Nationality Requirement: Primarily Indian citizens; certain other categories like subjects of Nepal/Bhutan or specified migrants are eligible with proper certificates.

  • Physical Efficiency Test (PET) and Medical Standards: Mandatory qualifying stages after CBT.

  • Category-wise Age Relaxation: Available for OBC, SC/ST, Ex-servicemen, PwBD, and others as per rules.

Parameter

Details (as per 2026 notification)

Exam Name

RRB Group D Level 1 Posts 2026

Conducting Body

Railway Recruitment Board (RRB)

Education Required

10th pass / ITI / NAC from recognized institution

Age Limit (General)

18–33 years (as on cutoff date, e.g., 01.01.2026)

Nationality

Indian citizen or as per RRB rules

Physical Test

PET + medical fitness mandatory

Official Notification

CEN 09/2025 (RRB Group D Notification 2026)

Check the RRB Group D Notification 2026 PDF and Apply Online link below before applying (links available on official RRB websites like rrbapply.gov.in or regional portals during active periods).

RRB Group D Educational Qualification 2026

The minimum educational qualification for RRB Group D 2026 requires candidates to have:

  • Passed Class 10/Matriculation from a recognized board, or

  • ITI certificate from NCVT/SCVT in a relevant trade, or

  • National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC) granted by NCVT.

Equivalence like NIOS/open schooling is generally accepted if recognized and mentioned in the official notification—always verify the exact clause in the CEN PDF. Final-year or appearing candidates are typically not eligible; the qualification must be completed by the application closing date.

Common doubts:

  • Gap years or backlogs do not disqualify if the certificate is obtained.

  • Subject stream usually does not matter for non-technical posts.

  • Always cross-check with the official notification to avoid issues.

RRB Group D Age Limit 2026

The general age limit for RRB Group D 2026 is 18 to 33 years, calculated as on the date specified in the notification (e.g., 01.01.2026). Candidates must fall within this range before applying.

Category

Minimum Age

Maximum Age (Base)

UR / General

18 years

33 years

OBC (NCL)

18 years

SC / ST

18 years

33 years + relaxation

RRB Group D Age Relaxation 2026 (Category-wise)

RRB Group D age relaxation 2026 is provided over the upper age limit as follows (exact details in official CEN):

Category

Age Relaxation over Upper Age Limit

OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)

3 years

SC / ST

5 years

Ex-servicemen

As per length of service (generally 3–8 years or more)

PwBD (Persons with Benchmark Disabilities)

10 years (additional for OBC/SC/ST)

Railway staff / Quasi-admin staff

As per norms and service length

Age relaxation is not automatic valid category certificates are mandatory at document verification. Confirm exact figures in the official CEN for 2026.

RRB Group D Nationality Criteria 2026

Under RRB Group D nationality criteria, candidates must be:

  • A citizen of India, or

  • A subject of Nepal or Bhutan, or

  • A Tibetan refugee who came to India before January 1, 1962 (with intent to settle permanently), or

  • A person of Indian origin migrated from specified countries (Pakistan, Burma, etc.) with an eligibility certificate from the Government of India.

Most applicants qualify as Indian citizens.

RRB Group D Physical Eligibility & PET 2026

The RRB Group D physical standards include two stages: PET (qualifying) and medical examination.

Physical Efficiency Test (PET) Requirements

PET is qualifying (pass/fail) and conducted for shortlisted CBT candidates. Typical requirements (as per notification; may vary slightly):

  • Male candidates: Running a specified distance in given time, lifting/carrying weight over distance.

  • Female candidates: Adjusted distance/weight parameters.

Only those passing PET proceed further.

RRB Group D Medical Standards 2026

The medical exam follows document verification and includes vision (distant/near), color vision, blood pressure, cardiac, hearing, and general fitness checks. Posts fall under A-2, B-1, C-1, etc., categories candidates must meet the standards for allotted posts.

Common disqualifying reasons include poor eyesight beyond limits, uncontrolled chronic conditions, or major disabilities incompatible with duties. Exact conditions are in the official rules.

Important Documents Required for RRB Group D Eligibility Verification

Candidates need these for various stages (especially document verification):

  • 10th/Matriculation certificate and mark sheet.

  • ITI/NAC certificate (if applicable).

  • Category certificates (SC/ST/OBC-NCL/EWS in central format).

  • PwBD certificate (if claiming).

  • Ex-servicemen discharge certificate.

  • Photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, etc.).

  • Passport-size photographs (per specs).

Who Is Not Eligible for RRB Group D 2026?

  • Candidates below 18 or above 33 years (even after relaxation).

  • Those without required 10th/ITI/NAC by cutoff date.

  • Non-eligible nationality or missing certificates.

  • Failing PET or medical exam.

  • Incomplete, incorrect, or forged documents.

  • Debarred by RRB or with disqualifying background (if specified).

MMRDA Recruitment 2026 - 235 AE, JE & More Posts | Apply Now
KRCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - 190 Posts | Apply Online
Rail Wheel Factory Apprentice 2026 - 192 Posts | Apply Offline

RRB Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details

Post Name Total Vacancies (All Railways)
Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP) 11,127

Eligibility Criteria

  • Qualifications: As per the detailed CEN No. 01/2026. Post-wise Education Qualification and Medical Standards will be published exclusively on the official websites of the participating RRBs.
  • Age Limit: 18 to 30 years as on 01.07.2026. Age relaxation as per Railway rules will be applicable as mentioned in the detailed CEN.
  • Candidates are advised to verify their primary details using Aadhaar during filing of the online application to avoid inconvenience and delays due to special detailed scrutiny at every stage of recruitment process for Non-Aadhaar verified applications.
  • Name and Date of Birth in Aadhaar shall be updated to match 100% with the Full Name and Date of Birth available in the 10th class pass certificate. Aadhaar also needs to be updated with the latest photo and latest biometrics (Fingerprint & Iris) before filling the online application.
  • All terms, conditions, eligibility criteria, procedures and other requirements governing the recruitment shall be strictly as per the detailed CEN No. 01/2026 (along with any corrigendum) to be published on the official websites of the RRBs.

Salary / Stipend

  • Post: Assistant Loco Pilot (ALP)
  • Pay Level: Level-2 as per 7th CPC Pay Matrix
  • Initial Pay: ₹19,900/- per month
  • Other allowances and benefits as applicable to Railway employees under 7th CPC will be as per detailed CEN No. 01/2026.

Age Limit (as on 01-07-2026)

  • Minimum Age: 18 Years
  • Maximum Age: 30 Years
  • Age is reckoned as on 01.07.2026.
  • Age relaxation for SC/ST, OBC, Ex-Servicemen, PwBD and other eligible categories will be as per Railway rules mentioned in the detailed CEN No. 01/2026.

Application Fee

  • Application fee details are not mentioned in this Indicative (Short) Notification. Fee details will be published in the detailed CEN No. 01/2026 on the official websites of the participating RRBs.
  • Applications must be submitted through Online Mode Only at https://www.rrbapply.gov.in.

Important Dates

Event Date
Notification (Indicative) Publication Date 21-03-2026
Opening Date of Application 15-05-2026
Closing Date for Submission of Application 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs)

How to Apply

  • Applications must be submitted Through Online Mode Only. Visit https://www.rrbapply.gov.in to fill and submit the online application form.
  • The Opening Date of Application is 15-05-2026 and the Closing Date is 14-06-2026 (23:59 Hrs).
  • Before filling the application, ensure that your Aadhaar details (Name and Date of Birth) match 100% with your 10th class pass certificate and that Aadhaar is updated with the latest photo and biometrics.
  • Candidates of all participating RRBs must apply through the centralized portal: https://www.rrbapply.gov.in.
  • Detailed application procedure, fee payment process, and step-by-step instructions will be available in the Detailed CEN No. 01/2026 to be published on the official websites of the RRBs.
  • Candidates may also visit the website of their respective RRB for region-specific information and updates. Participating RRB websites include: rrbahmedabad.gov.in, rrbajmer.gov.in, rrbbnc.gov.in, rrbbbhopal.gov.in, rrbbbs.gov.in, rrbbilaspur.gov.in, rrbcdg.gov.in, rrbchennai.gov.in, rrbgkp.gov.in, rrbguwahati.gov.in, rrbjammu.nic.in, rrbkolkata.gov.in, rrbmalda.gov.in, rrbmumbai.gov.in, rrbmuzaffarpur.gov.in, rrbpatna.gov.in, rrbpryj.gov.in, rrbranchi.gov.in, rrbsecunderabad.gov.in, rrbsiliguri.gov.in, rrbthiruvananthapuram.gov.in.

Indian Airforce Benefits of Agniveer (Agnipath) : Intake 01/2027

  • Indian young people whose age is between 17.5 to 21 years can apply in this Agneepath scheme.
  • Agneepath will allow youth to serve in the armed forces for a period of four years.
  • LIC (LIfe Insurance) : Agniveers will be provided life insurance cover of Rs. 48 Lakhs for the duration of their engagement period as Agniveers in the Indian Airforce.
  • Agniveer’ Skill Certificate : A skill-set certificate will be given to Aginveer by the Indian Air Force after the completion of the time period.
  • Leave : Annual : 30 Days, Sick Leave. Medical advice based.
  • Every year there will be some kind of benefit in this Agneepath scheme.

PDCC Bank Clerk Answer Key 2025 Will Be Released

The Pune District Central Cooperative Bank will release the answer key for the Clerk recruitment exam 2025. Once published, candidates who appeared for the exam will be able to access and download the PDCC Bank Answer Key 2025 from the official website pdccbank.co.in. Stay tuned to this article for detailed updates about the Pune District Central Cooperative Bank Answer Key 2025.

Check and Download - PDCC Bank Clerk Answer Key 2025

Where To Check PDCC Bank Clerk Answer Key 2025?

On the official website, PDCC Bank will officially release the answer key for the Clerk Posts. Candidates who appear for the exam will be able to access and download the provisional answer key by visiting the official website at pdccbank.co.in.

PDCC Bank Clerk Answer Key 2025 Notes

  • The PDCC Bank Clerk Answer Key 2025 will be released in the last week of August 2025.
  • The answer key will be available only on the official website (pdccbank.co.in). Candidates will have to use their user login ID and password (created during registration) to view the Answer Key on the webpage.
  • Here we will also provide direct links to download the PDCC Bank Clerk Answer Key 2025 once it is released - View Answer Key

How to Download PDCC Bank Answer Key 2025?

Follow the steps below to download the PDCC Bank Clerk Answer Key 2025 from the official website once it will be released.

  • Step 1 - Visit the official website pdccbank.co.in.
  • Step 2 - Look for the answer key tab on the page
  • Step 3 -  There you will find the link for the PDCC Bank Answer Key 2025 answer key.
  • Step 4 - You can now get the PDCC Bank Answer Key 2025 answer key here.

How to Download UPPSC Staff Nurse Unani Answer Key 2026 ?

Follow these simple steps to download your answer key:

  1. Visit the official website: uppsc.up.nic.in
  2. Navigate to the "Answer Key" or "View Answer Key" section (or check latest notices)
  3. Click on "NOTICE REGARDING ADVT. NO. A-3/E-1/2025, STAFF NURSE UNANI (MALE/FEMALE)(PRE.) EXAM-2025" or related answer key link
  4. Log in using your Registration Number/Roll Number and Date of Birth/Password if required (or directly download PDF question paper & answer key)
  5. Your answer key with question paper will appear on screen
  6. Download and save the PDF for future reference

How to Raise Objection Against UPPSC Staff Nurse Unani Answer Key 2026 ?

If you disagree with any answer in the provisional key, follow these steps (as per UPPSC guidelines):

  1. Log in to your candidate portal on uppsc.up.nic.in
  2. Go to the "Objection" or "Challenge Answer Key" section (if available) or follow the notice instructions
  3. Select the question(s) you want to challenge
  4. Upload supporting documents or references (if required)
  5. Pay the objection fee (if applicable, details in official notice)
  6. Submit before the deadline: 25 March 2026

Important: Objections submitted after the deadline will NOT be considered. Refer to the official notice for exact procedure and fee details.

How to Calculate Your Score Using UPPSC Staff Nurse Unani Answer Key 2026 ?

Use this formula to estimate your score:

Total Score = (Correct Answers × Marks per Question) – (Wrong Answers × Negative Marking)

Marking Scheme for UPPSC Staff Nurse Unani Exam (Prelims):

  • Correct Answer: +1.33 marks (or as per official pattern, typically 100 questions for 150 marks)
  • Wrong Answer: -0.33 mark (negative marking, 1/3 deduction)
  • Unattempted: 0 marks
